productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Jealous Cailyn White Top White Tops
description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% 160GSM cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front with three bows in pink, black and the third with black and white checks   Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy white t-shirt from jealous 21. The graphic print of a girl blowing bubbles with three bows in red, black and white checks, and black adds to it a completely girly vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and heeled sandals for maximum style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
